markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a new content review process and January production plan.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Review Process:** A new process will balance quality and scale. Emily will review 3 net-new articles/wk and 2 refreshes/wk. Webinar repurposes will be fast-tracked for publication with a lighter review by Abdallah's team.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)
  - [**January Production Plan:** The plan targets \~15 articles/wk, including 10 webinar repurposes, to maintain velocity while calibrating the new process.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)
  - [**CMS Migration Freeze:** A \~2-week content freeze is planned for late Jan/early Feb. Only essential content for active campaigns will be built during this period.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [**Project Management:** The team will explore using Asana to centralize project tracking and eliminate reliance on Slack for status updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Process Alignment

  - [**Problem:** The previous high-volume (20+/wk) production model lacked sufficient review, creating messaging risks. A recent pause to fix this has stalled growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new process balances quality and scale by segmenting content and defining clear review paths.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Net-New Blogs:** GrowthX provides outlines for Emily's review before drafting.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
          - [**Volume:** 3 articles/wk.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
          - [**Support:** A product-focused content manager may assist with product-specific topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**Content Refreshes:** Emily conducts a lightweight review of existing URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
          - [**Volume:** 2 articles/wk.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
          - [**Process:** GrowthX uses green highlights to show all changes.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [**Webinar Repurposes:** Abdallah's team (Nian, Kelsey) will conduct a final check before publication.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This is low-risk content, as it is derived directly from approved webinars.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
          - [**Volume:** Scalable, targeting \~10 articles/wk.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=2306.0)

### January Production Plan & CMS Migration

  - [**January Goal:** Maintain production velocity (\~15 articles/wk) to hit growth targets while calibrating the new process.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)
  - [**CMS Migration Freeze:** A \~2-week content freeze is planned for late Jan/early Feb during the website migration.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
      - [**Impact:** Only imperative content for active campaigns (e.g., RSA) will be built.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
      - [**Workaround:** GrowthX can build non-essential content directly in the new CMS for publication post-launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

### Project Management & Tracking

  - [**Proposal:** Use Asana to centralize project tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides a single source of truth, avoiding status updates getting lost in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Create a dedicated Asana board linking to Airtable records and Google Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)

### Performance & Projections

  - [**Concern:** Abdallah is concerned the new process will stall growth and impact team metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
  - [**Context:** The previous forecast was based on 50 URLs that were recently taken down. The new forecast is for *additional* traffic from new content.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=2390.0)
      - [**Projection:** \~11k total clicks by Feb EOM (average scenario).](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=2419.0)
  - [**GA4 Status:** Meaghan confirmed GA4 tags are firing correctly. Low session counts (1-2) are likely due to a low Looker Studio reporting threshold, not a tracking error.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=2830.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Emily:** Review content ideas in Airtable before the Jan 8 meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Callie:** Review the "ZipBomb download" article before PTO.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [**Callie:** Sync with the product-focused content manager about assisting with reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [**Jo:** Summarize the new content process and share it in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=2784.0)
  - [**Meaghan:** Provide exact dates for the CMS migration and content freeze.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [**Abdallah:** Discuss the Asana proposal with Abdallah.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [**All:** Defer the detailed GA4 setup discussion to the next call.](https://fathom.video/share/Ro4NiWW1zV457Mqv9PXRQGbiN6KsnRGn?tab=summary&timestamp=2828.0)
